reviews.review_description:
Plunger Climber is an absurd and crazy VR game. Using two plunger tools, you climb upwards in a chaotic world full of crazy obstacles.

The controls work well, but the game is quite difficult—one mistake and you fall back down. That makes it frustrating at times, but also addictive.

Plunger Climber is a VR oddity that transforms simple mechanics into a game of skill and madness. 
Its humor, playful physics, and addictive challenge make it an ideal experience for players who enjoy quirky challenges and fun sessions to share or stream!
